title: Canadian Nutrient File, 2015 - Open Government Portal
content:
## Canadian Nutrient File, 2015
Canada's national food composition database reporting the amount of nutrients in foods commonly consumed in Canada.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Health Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Compilation of Canadian Food Composition Data -  Database Structure 2015 PDF English guide PDF Explore More information Go to resource
- Compilation of Canadian Food Composition Data -  Database Structure 2015 PDF French guide PDF Explore More information Go to resource
- Compilation of Canadian Food Composition Data -  Database Structure 2015 HTML English guide HTML Explore More information Go to resource
- Compilation of Canadian Food Composition Data -  Database Structure 2015 HTML French guide HTML Explore More information Go to resource
- Canadian Nutrient File, 2026
- Usual Intakes from Food for Energy, Nutrients and Other Dietary Components
- Food Source Contribution Table (2015 CCHS Nutrition)
- The Healthy Eating Food Index 2019
This dataset is rated 4 time(s) with an average rating of Good
